text: Eating a balanced diet is essential for maintaining energy and preventing illness. Make sure your meals include plenty of fruits, vegetables, whole grains, and lean proteins. Regular exercise, such as walking or cycling for 30 minutes a day, helps strengthen your heart and muscles. Equally important is getting enough sleep—most adults need seven to nine hours each night to feel rested and focused. Don't forget about mental health; take breaks, practice mindfulness, and talk to friends or family when you feel stressed. Finally, aim for a good work-life balance by setting boundaries between your job and personal time. Making small, consistent changes in these areas can lead to a healthier, happier life.
